title: Vibrant Light Venezuelan Macaroni Stir-fry
description: A pungent, light, comforting Venezuelan-inspired stir-fry featuring low-carb pasta, fresh vegetables, and aji amarillo for a burst of flavor.
instructions: Rinse the low‑carb pasta in cold water and set aside.
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add diced onion and minced garlic, sautéing until translucent.
Stir in julienned carrot, sliced bell pepper, and diced cabbage, cooking for 3 minutes.
Add the rinsed pasta and a tablespoon of aji amarillo paste, tossing until the pasta is coated.
Pour in lime juice, sprinkle chopped cilantro, and season with salt and pepper.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and let sit for one minute to allow flavors to meld.
Serve hot, garnished with extra cilantro if desired.
Enjoy this vibrant, low‑carb Venezuelan stir‑fry as a comforting meal.
